description_long: This is a rectangular, upright vending machine with a black exterior and visible signs of wear, such as scuff marks and scratches along the edges. The front face features a transparent window displaying several rows of individually packaged snacks or items, each in its own compartment with a spiral dispensing mechanism. To the right of the window is a control panel with a digital display, a keypad, and what appears to be a payment interface. The sides and back of the machine are solid black with no visible features or openings. The base of the machine is slightly recessed, and there is a product retrieval slot at the bottom of the front face. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or transit stations.
description: A black, rectangular vending machine with a transparent front window displaying snacks, a control panel with keypad and payment interface, and a product retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_0: The front view shows the transparent window with visible snacks, a control panel with keypad and display, and a product retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view is featureless, showing a plain black surface with no visible openings or details.
description_view_2: The back view is also plain black, with faint outlines of access panels or vents near the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, with a solid black surface and no distinguishing features.
attribute_display_panel: A small rectangular digital display panel is located on the right side of the front face, above the keypad, showing illuminated numbers or instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is integrated into the control panel on the right front, featuring a slot likely for coins and possibly a card reader, both compact and adjacent to the keypad.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A numeric keypad with individual square buttons is present on the right front, arranged in a grid for product selection.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A horizontal rectangular slot is located at the bottom center of the front face, likely with a flap for retrieving purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: No visible branding, logos, or signage are present on the exterior of the vending machine.
